overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with pink hair navigating a futuristic urban environment during sunset. The character moves from a covered walkway under an elevated highway, through city streets with construction barriers, into a narrow graffiti-covered back alley with parked cars, and emerges into an open plaza with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: character transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: moving steadily under the elevated highway following the main path

notable_agents.action: player character with pink hair and backpack moving ahead of camera

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating shadow over the walkway
multi-story residential building with balconies and external fire escapes
glowing cyan holographic advertisement floating near building
metal emergency stairs attached to apartment facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic city. The camera follows a pink-haired character walking along a concrete sidewalk, passing by a concrete apartment block with external fire escapes. Around the 3-second mark, the character breaks into a run. Neon holographic signs glow in the distance while the setting sun creates warm light at the end of the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with construction barriers approaching alley entrance

events.description: approaching narrow alley entrance with steam vents and construction debris

agents.ego_description: jogging through the street to keep pace with the character ahead

notable_agents.action: running ahead toward the alley entrance carrying a large weapon

entered.detail: orange and white striped barriers blocking off part of the street
circular concrete parking structure with multiple levels
piles of garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk
vent emitting steam from the ground near the alley entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a sunlit street section, running past construction barriers and trash bags. A multi-story parking garage dominates the view ahead. The camera follows as the character approaches a narrow alley entrance marked by steam vents and debris, transitioning from the open street into a more enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with abandoned vehicles and graffiti

events.description: enters narrow alleyway from city street, ground changes to dirt and weeds
approaching group of NPCs standing near parked cars in the alley

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow alley examining the abandoned vehicles and surroundings

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing near a red car conversing with each other

entered.detail: vintage red sports car with green stripes parked in the alley
wall covered in colorful street art and murals
bright yellow roll-up door at the end of the alley
overgrown grass and weeds growing through cracks in the dirt
dark brick facade with air conditioning units attached

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dimly lit back alley with dirt ground and overgrown weeds. An abandoned red vintage car sits prominently in the center, while graffiti covers the walls. The character approaches a group of NPCs standing near the car by a yellow garage door at the alley's end. The space is enclosed by brick walls with neon signs and security lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with police station and digital billboards

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with view of setting sun
camera pans up to reveal setting sun creating lens flare behind buildings

agents.ego_description: exiting the alley and looking up at the large building and sunset sky

entered.detail: large brutalist building with massive digital billboards displaying NCPD imagery
twin screens showing police propaganda with red and blue graphics
the overpass from earlier now visible from the exterior plaza side
bright golden sun setting between futuristic skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The character exits the alley into a wide open plaza bathed in golden hour light. A massive police station building dominates the view, covered in large digital billboards. The camera pans upward to reveal the setting sun shining between futuristic spires and the elevated highway structure visible in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the warm sunlight and neon signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of an urban overpass into a wide, sun-drenched futuristic plaza. It begins under a massive elevated highway, following a pink-haired character who breaks into a run past concrete apartment blocks and glowing holographic signs toward a distant warm light. As the character emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a sunlit street filled with construction barriers and trash before narrowing sharply into a dim, graffiti-covered alleyway. The camera then pushes through this enclosed space, passing an abandoned red vintage car and a group of NPCs by a yellow garage door, before finally breaking out into a vast open plaza. The environment transforms into a golden-hour landscape dominated by a massive police station and towering digital billboards, with the camera panning upward to reveal the setting sun between futuristic spires.
